ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Full title of the movie */,
  "title_trim" TEXT /* Trimmed title used for searching and indexing */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "rating" REAL /* Aggregate rating of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the movie director */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the ranking applies */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the movie in the given year */,
  "previous_year_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the movie in the previous year */,
  "rank_difference" INTEGER /* Difference in rank from the previous year */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking (e.g., top 100, top 250) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rank_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank change entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the rank change occurred */,
  "rank_change_type" TEXT /* Type of rank change (e.g., significant increase, dropped off) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the rank change */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rank_changes_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., movie enthusiast, critic, researcher) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes marking the review as helpful */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes marking the review as not helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was provided */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which movie rankings are available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  "primary_genre" INTEGER /* Whether the genre is primary for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_awards" (
  "movie_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-award relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award */,
  "year_won" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-director relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
